content:
Remove  rork apis end to end with out crashing the app rork sdk, rork taltik, after I need live proof evidence and verified now RORK REMOVAL FINAL CUTOVER — ZERO RORK RUNTIME DEPENDENCY

Current status is NOT VERIFIED. Rork removal is still partial.

Finish the cutover end-to-end without crashing IVX.

DO NOT remove working code until the IVX replacement is verified.
DO NOT mark VERIFIED until app runs with zero Rork runtime dependency.

EXECUTE NOW:

1. Create rollback tag:
   pre-rork-removal-stable

2. Set IVX-owned AI provider chain:
   Primary: IVX_AI_GATEWAY / AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY
   Fallback 1: OPENAI_API_KEY
   Fallback 2: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
   Remove Rork as fallback.

3. Remove Rork runtime env vars:
   EXPO_PUBLIC_RORK_API_BASE_URL
   EXPO_PUBLIC_RORK_AUTH_URL
   EXPO_PUBLIC_RORK_FUNCTIONS_URL
   EXPO_PUBLIC_RORK_TOOLKIT_SECRET_KEY
   EXPO_PUBLIC_TOOLKIT_URL
   RORK_TOOLKIT_SECRET_KEY

4. Remove Rork package/runtime usage:
   @rork-ai/toolkit-sdk
   withRorkMetro
   toolkit.rork.com
   api.rork.com
   rork_sk
   EXPO_PUBLIC_RORK_*

5. Replace with IVX-owned names:
   IVX_API_BASE_URL
   IVX_AI_GATEWAY_URL
   IVX_OWNER_AI_URL
   IVX_TOOLKIT_URL
   IVX_DEPLOY_API_URL

6. Patch backend + Expo + iOS together.
   Do not rename Swift enum values unless backend JSON is renamed in same commit.

7. Run:
   typecheck
   backend tests
   Expo Android build
   iOS build
   Web build
   secret scan
   grep for Rork references

8. Deploy production:
   Push GitHub main
   Trigger Render
   Verify /health
   Verify /version
   Verify public chat
   Verify owner AI
   Verify senior developer route
   Verify Android/iOS/Web

9. Final grep must show:
   No runtime imports from @rork-ai/toolkit-sdk
   No toolkit.rork.com runtime calls
   No api.rork.com runtime calls
   No RORK secret required to boot
   Rork references allowed only in archived proof/history/docs marked non-runtime.

FINAL REPORT ONLY:

STATE:
RORK_DEPENDENCIES_FOUND:
RORK_DEPENDENCIES_REMOVED:
FILES_CHANGED:
AI_PROVIDER_CHAIN:
RORK_ENV_STATUS:
SECRET_SCAN_STATUS:
TYPECHECK_STATUS:
TESTS_RUN:
ANDROID_STATUS:
IOS_STATUS:
WEB_STATUS:
BACKEND_STATUS:
GITHUB_SHA:
RENDER_DEPLOY_ID:
LIVE_HEALTH:
LIVE_VERSION:
ROLLBACK_TAG:
BLOCKERS:
FINAL_STATUS:

RULE:
If any Rork runtime dependency remains, FINAL_STATUS = BLOCKED.
If IVX AI fails without Rork, FINAL_STATUS = BLOCKED.
Only mark VERIFIED when IVX boots and works with zero Rork runtime dependency.
